## Release Gate Checklist

- API contract review signed off
- Schema migration plan approved
- Security review with AppSec completed
- Load test target met for p95 latency
- Feature flag default verified in staging
- Localized strings for ES, JA, KO ready
- Telemetry dashboards updated and shared
- On-call rotation rebalanced for week
- Documentation pages cross-linked
- Customer comm draft sent to comms team
- Rollback runbook smoke tested
- Post-launch review meeting booked
